title: Trailing commas don't work for `GROUP BY`
description:
### Company or project name
ClickHouse Inc.
### Use case
For consistency, it would be nice to use trailing commas in different parts of SELECT statements
### Describe the solution you'd like
```sql
CREATE TABLE users (uid Int16, name String, age Int16) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO users VALUES (1231, 'John', 33);
INSERT INTO users VALUES (6666, 'Ksenia', 48);
INSERT INTO users VALUES (8888, 'Alice', 50);
-- This works
SELECT
uid, avg(age),  -- trailing comma
FROM users
GROUP BY uid;
-- This doesn't work
SELECT
uid, avg(age)
FROM users
GROUP BY uid,      -- trailing comma
```
poc: CREATE TABLE users (uid Int16, name String, age Int16) ENGINE = Memory;
key_bug_features: Trailing commas in GROUP BY clause
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE products (id Int32, name String, price Float64, created_at DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;

SELECT id, avg(price),  -- trailing comma
FROM products
GROUP BY id,      -- trailing comma
;

SELECT id, count(*)
FROM products
GROUP BY id,  -- trailing comma
created_at;
